app.name: Fyntra
app.tagline: Parent peace of mind. School operational ease.

login.heading: Sign in to Fyntra

phoneStep.body: Enter your phone number to receive a one-time code.
phoneStep.invalidPhone: Enter a valid Pakistani mobile number (starts with +92, 12 digits total).

errors.unknownPhone: That phone number is not registered. Please contact your school.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.demoHint: Demo: any 4-digit code works. Try +923001000001 (parent), +923001100001 (admin), or +923001200001 (teacher).

roleHome.placeholder: Real content lands here in upcoming steps.

parent.noChildren: No children linked to your account yet. Please contact your school.
parent.loadError: We couldn't reach the school server. Pull to try again.

preSchool.title: School starts in {{minutes}} minutes.
preSchool.subtitle: We'll let you know the moment {{name}} arrives.

absent.title: {{name}} has not arrived.
absent.subtitle: School started {{minutes}} minutes ago. Please reach out to your school.

unverified.title: We can't confirm {{name}}'s status right now.
unverified.subtitle: The gate reader is offline. The school has been notified.

timeline.heading: {{name}} — 30-day history
timeline.noEventsForDay: No taps recorded on this day.
